steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: "Martin Hale has a _____ painting portraits of notable figures." The next sentence calls these "characteristic works" and his portraits are "esteemed." The blank must mean being known for or distinguished by portrait-painting.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean that Hale is known for this type of work. Substitute each choice:
  • "complaint about": grievance or objection — Hale would not be described as having a complaint about his own characteristic, esteemed work. ✗
  • "reputation for": being widely known for — "Martin Hale has a reputation for painting portraits" fits: his portraits are esteemed and characteristic. ✓
  • "question about": uncertainty or doubt — his portraits are described as esteemed and characteristic, not questioned or doubted. ✗
  • "requirement for": a condition that must be met — painting portraits is not presented as an obligation Hale must fulfill, but as something he is known for. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
